candidates.why: Explicit R&D D&A row under Development Expenses, but Development Expenses is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD. Per the R&D interaction rule, do not add this separately.

Do not add component rows when parent bucket is already selected, especially since a broader summary D&A row is present.

This is a separate same-level operating D&A summary line above operating profit. It sits alongside the selected XSGA component rows rather than clearly under one of them, and it closely matches the sum of the detailed D&A component rows beneath it, so it is the preferred row to add separately.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket consists of operating overhead component rows and does not itself include a dedicated total D&A line. A separate operating D&A summary row is presented at the same level above EBIT, and it approximates the sum of the detailed D&A component rows beneath it. Therefore, add only the summary row. Do not separately add Depreciation/Amortization in R&D because Development Expenses is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD.
